3234030.name: Jester
3234030.description:
Game Description:
Third-person perspective 3D points game, achieve points to eliminate BOSS, easy to operate. Watch out for zombies.

How it works:
Move: W/S/A/D
Shoot the Explosive Ball: Left mouse button
Rotate the view: Right-click
Suspension: ESC
Lens distance: Mouse wheel
Toggle Full Screen/Window: F11

Clearance Conditions:
1. Destroy the boss after the points are reached.

Game End Conditions:
1. Loss of HP.
2. Close the game.

PS: Progress cannot be saved, only the player is paused when the game is paused! Happy gaming!
